Rock of Ages (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $38,518,613Details
International Box Office $22,513,319
Worldwide Box Office $61,031,932
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,504,688
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,762,825
Total $17,267,513
Further financial details...

Synopsis

ROCK OF AGES tells the story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Foreigner, Journey, Poison, REO Speedwagon, Twisted Sister and more.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,437,269 (37.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,470 opening theaters/3,470 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,874,703

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 15th, 2012 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
June 15th, 2012 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: June 13th, 2012 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
June 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Austria)
June 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Germany)
June 14th, 2012 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 14th, 2012 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: October 9th, 2012 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, sexual content and pervasive language.
(Rating bulletin 2221, 5/2/2012)
R for some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2232, 7/18/2012)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Gratuitous Cameos
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Censorship, Musicians, Romance
Social setting: Music Industry
Source material: Novel or Other Work Adapted by Author
Subgenre: Jukebox Musical
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Corner Store Entertainment, Material Pictures, Offspring Entertainment, Adam Shankman
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

ROCK OF AGES tells the story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Foreigner, Journey, Poison, REO Speedwagon, Twisted Sister and more.
